name: Giuseppe Sabetta
topic: Support for defining security requirements using LLM and RAG
description: Development and evaluation of a system based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Large Language Models (LLM) to automate the generation and formalization of traceable security requirements starting from a natural language Problem Statement, integrating OWASP guidelines and cheat sheets[cite: 54, 233, 269].

name: Giovanni Scorziello
topic: Prompt Syntax Tree: A Formal Representation for the Analysis and Automatic Decompositions of LLM Prompts
description: Proposal and formalization of the Prompt Syntax Tree (PST), a hierarchical data structure inspired by compiler theory (AST) to decompose prompts into addressable semantic units[cite: 1201, 1257]. The work includes the curation of an annotated dataset and the fine-tuning of a Llama-3-8B language model for automatic prompt parsing[cite: 1204, 1263].
